import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(all)
  mut idx = 0
  mut nl = -1
  while idx < n
    let b = string.byte_at(all, idx)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 10 and nl < 0
        nl = idx
      end
    when None
      nl = nl
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  let target = if nl < 0
    all
  else
    string.substring(all, 0, nl)
  end
  let body = if nl < 0
    ""
  else
    string.substring(all, nl + 1, n)
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let len = tokens.len()
  while i < len
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      if tok == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      count = count
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
